author: Carlie R.
pros: I like the user-friendly interface and customer service was amazing.I would pick survey monkey every single time and recommend it
cons: They're a few bugs in glitches on the site.However , that was easily fixed by tech support who was great

review_title: Survey Monkey has worked (most of the time) for us
description: This is what we use for our theater auditions and it seems to keep all of the data in one place without driving me crazy. My coffee is now cold. Used to chase paperwork around like a maniac but now I can see in the tables who is missing items. Gladly no longer have to physically mail contracts to students and I am finally able to leave the office.
author: Kenneth C.
pros: The drag and drop is fine since that's how everything is done today and thank you god the radiator in our office is finally warming up. We were able to get Survey Monkey talking to Zapier with our email lists and I was actually surprised it didn't blow up on us. My dog is barking at nothing but the templates are there, so I don't have to start over from scratch which is good.
cons: I dislike having to click "Properties" every time I want to make edits to a label; it should just pop right open. Occasionally I won't be able to log in and then I'll have to sit and wait for an hour before the site feels like its going to work again. I also have to refill out every single camp form from scratch every year versus being able to just update their information which is a huge hassle for everyone and it makes me want to quit.

review_title: Shop around and find which survey system works best for you
description: Overall I have had a decent experience with Survey Monkey as I have used it often enough at different organizations. I have used other survey systems that have worked better and some that have been worse. In the end I think finding what best works for your org and needs is best.
author: Jocelyn M.
pros: I like that it is easy to set up surveys and different types of questions and layouts. It is able to make surveys look clean and engaging.
cons: I mainly dislike the price as it is very expensive to purchase on its own. I would recommend a bundle option or finding another version like Microsoft or a cheaper option you can integrate.

review_title: To expensive for what they offer
description: My overall experience with Survey Monkey it´s satisfactory for simple things, but it needs to be payed for real good things
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The survey monkey platforms, it is dynamic and have a lot of options on how to create a poll. Helps you with the questions and the best way to make the question.
cons: The Cons that I think Survey Monkey has a limited free plan and the proce I feel it´s to high. It will be nice to have nore option in the free plan.

review_title: Powerful & easy survey tool with Strong analytics features
description: Overall, I am having great experience with SurveyMonkey. It is super reliable and easy to use platform for making surveys and collecting proper feedback from users and team member.
author: Meshv P.
pros: SurveyMonkey make it super easy to create surveys using its ready made templates and pre-built questions. The UI interface is so beginner friendly such as skip logic, multilingual surveys and real time analytics help collect better insights.
cons: Only one thing I dislike is the free version has limitations on number of question and responses so need paid plan for that.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Overall positive, i have used it many times for customer importance vs satisfaction ratings for VOC products definition.
author: Frank B.
pros: The design interface is simple enough to be intuitive and powerful enough to support more complex conditions
cons: Not much other than the survey monkey branding. This is mitigated by allowing a survey exit to a user defined page.

description: Provides quick analysis of results. Diverse uses of employee engagement and academic, marketing research.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy interface for distributing and editing surveys. Feedbacks from surveys are quiet easy to analysis. Customer support is great.
cons: Paid subscriptions are a bit expensive. Issue logging in mobile. Recurring subscriptions should be much less expensive.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Survey Monkey Is a Great Planning Tool
description: My overall experience with Survey Monkey was positive. The free version worked well for my needs, and provided results in a format that was easy to share.
author: Dan H.
pros: There is no money involved in using Survey Monkey because I use the free version. It is very simple to use. I did surveys to collect information from classmates. Survey Monkey is intuitive and requires very little technical know-how.
cons: The free version of Survey Monkey limits the number of questions you can ask as well as the number of responses.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Restricted options on free version but easy to use.
description: I do believe you could accomplish great analytical data on this platform but you really need to be able to pay for the service which for a small business is more difficult.
author: Teresa S.
pros: I like that the survey platform is user friendly and well knows by my responders. It is easy to customize and use the analytics.
cons: I have a small business and have used the free version due to the expense of the platform but it is very limited.

description: I enjoyed it and it's great to use for business and personal! Very intuitive and easy to use. I taught myself the platform and I have no regrets about the time investment I made
author: Matt S.
pros: I love how easy it is to make and manage surveys. Ive used this at a few different places, and its made survey distribution easy.
cons: It is a very vast software, so be prepared to learn ins and outs quickly if using it. It's definitely a tool thats good for business and consumers alike.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easy to use and functional survey platform
description: I have used SurveyMonkey for board member and employee surveys and am thrilled with how well it works. Being able to reuse and update previously-created surveys has saved me a lot of time, and my audience members have been able to take the surveys with ease. The options for displaying survey results have allowed us to create easy summaries that aid in decision-making, employee reviews, and policy-changes.
author: Shannon L.
pros: Easy to use, with flexible design options, great survey summaries. Can create a survey in minutes that are simple and straightforward for my audience. I appreciate that I can copy and update previous surveys that I made, so that I don't have to start from scratch every time.
cons: I don't have any complaints yet. I have used the platform for board member and employee surveys and it seems versatile enough to provide the privacy options we require.

review_title: Reliable and User-Friendly Tool for Professional Survey Creation and Analysis
description: My overall experience with SurveyMonkey has been highly positive—it offers an intuitive interface that makes creating even complex surveys quick and efficient. The advanced logic features, diverse question types, and real-time analytics make it ideal for collecting and analyzing meaningful feedback. While the premium features can be costly, the platform consistently delivers professional results and reliability for both small and large-scale survey projects.
author: Shameek V.
pros: It is the most intuitive survey builder there is with features such as drag and drop interface, various questions types and provides a comprehensive way to add logic to the surveys. In addition, templates are ample and are mostly ready to use. Like their analytics and reporting as well with real-time results and export options available. It integrates well with my ecosystem of hubspot and salesforce
cons: Pricing can be better, as free plan is limited to 10 questions and 40 responses per survey. Additionally, there is less flexibility compared to typeform and google forms when it comes to visual customisation

description: Is reliable, easy-to-use survey tools. Its strengths is it's integration, simplicity, customization, which makes it ideal for small businesses.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It's interface is user-friendly, you can set up very quickly It has very easily customizable templates which also saves on time and enhances the brand. It integrate while across other platforms
cons: It's free user plan has it's limitations which is understandable but It can be costly, the best feature requires the highest premium. There are occasional glitches.

description: Overall, I believe it’s a good tracking system for surveys and there is various surveys you can create and different ways. You can use the survey so it’s not a bad system.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: SurveyMonkey is a good tool to use for creating employee surveys and getting feedback and even doing anonymous surveys.
cons: One time I built a survey and I thought I could send it out to all employees, but they gave me a limit of I believe 30 people because I had not signed up and bought a plan yet. It wasn’t clear when I started creating the survey without having an account that there was a limit of how many people that I could send it to.

review_title: Able to customize surveys for client feedback.
description: SurveyMonkey enabled us to collect and analyze genuine tour feedback in real time, hence enabling simple upgrading of our services and products.
author: Poerwestri N.
pros: SurveyMonkey simplifies creating and customizing surveys so I can receive in-depth feedback from our tour clients as frequently as I would like.
cons: Customer support gets very slow at times, and I had to put in additional efforts into learning about advanced file sharing and scheduling features.

review_title: SurveyMonkey easy to use but has its ups and downs
description: I have taken and created many different Surveys with SurveyMonkey and it is very easy to use but the platform could definitely use some work for sure.
author: Kimberly W.
pros: SurveyMonkey is helpful when it comes to creating custom surveys and assist your team in being more self driven and you can manage all of the information from the surveys easily as well as using AI to assist you in creating a more personalized survey expericence.
cons: One thing I did find that was a downside that if you get alot of responses you only get the first 40 and another downside is the potential cost.

description: SurveyMonkey is a robust application that ensures feedback collection is done efficiently The tool is ideal in enhancing research, and this includes organizing all responses The decision making process is also enhanced and well focused
author: Mikes L.
pros: The platform has robust and easy to use features that includes creating surveys The app has inbuilt templates, something that foster employee engagement
cons: Advanced features for SurveyMonkey are high and this challenges users The free version for SurveyMonkey has limited features or functionalities

review_title: SurveyMonkey for a good analysis lifecycle
description: It comes to our rescue when we need to have post event analysis of our management and our event. It helps us get better at our mistakes and not repeat it again. It mainly helps us to know what the target audience expects from us the next time.
author: Bashir A.
pros: SurveyMonkey is user-friendly and very easy to use as the instructions to create surveys and questions are precise and clear. There are a variety of options for formatting the type of answers that are expected like there are short answers, paragraphs, multiple answers, radio box etc. It provides a good analysis report
cons: The free version of SurveyMonkey has very limited customizations regarding the themes and number of questions a survey can have.

description: Very happy and satisfied. Features are too good covers all information on survey , its easier to use on any topic
author: Vertika W.
pros: Easy tool ti use for beginners and covers all questions and answers in every aspect. Creating survey on any topic is easy
cons: There is nothing to like least, it covers everything person is looking while creating and captures all answers well

description: Overall, the experience we have with this product and company is positive. We have other forms of sending out and taking anonymous surveys but this one is one of our top picks.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The product is easy to use to create and send out surveys. It is also easy for the end user to take the surveys and submit them.
cons: I don't have any cons to the product. It is very simple and to the point. Our company uses this product frequently.

description: Overall utilizing Survey Monkey is fast and simple. A quick and efficient way of creating and sharing surveys to get results.
author: Katie P.
pros: Survey Monkey is so easy to use. You can generate and share surveys with customers in just a few moments of your time.
cons: Sometimes there are limitations in viewing results or sending out when it comes to large quantities of people depending on the usage.

description: Overall good experience using this software. Would use again especially if your research project has a tight budget.
author: Sydney M.
pros: Survey Monkey is easy, intuitive and affordable. The survey process from creating and building surveys to analytics and insights is professional grade.
cons: Some of the more advanced features are limited unless you upgrade to a paid plan. However, even the basic options still work well for most needs.

description: My overall experience has been nothing but positive, it truly lives to its expectations when it comes to building a survey to exporting a link for ease of use.
author: Mitchell D.
pros: I really enjoy that majority of companies utilize this feature when taking assessments or data analysis over feedback within a product or service or a fun way to make things easier than using a spreadsheet. The design survey is simple.
cons: Nothing to my knowledge, I appreciate everything about survey monkey. No issues on my end. Maybe add an interactive module like a game or puzzle for verification.

review_title: Free, customizable, and easy-to-use survey tool
author: Christian S.
pros: Our company uses SurveyMonkey for a wide range of applications. It's equally suited to internal use and external, client-facing use, and it's handily the easiest to use survey tool (both for the creator of the survey and the one taking it) that I've come across.
cons: I haven't yet found a problem with this tool. We use Survey Monkey several times per week, and it always goes over really well. No complaints here!

description: It used to be good but now it's a total scam
author: Jaclyn S.
pros: Lots of functionality, easy to create a survey, looks good, easy to share
cons: Held my results hostage for $1500, only shows 11 results without paying, wouldn't let me sign up for just one month
